items: Opening terrain read repeated Eastweald control across five separate beats; compressed to one road-status sentence plus one sensory image.
Farmhouse approach restated order/freshness twice before entry; collapsed to one tactical read and one Jaina confirmation.
Kitchen search carried extra inventory words around shelves, bottles, and threshold handling; trimmed to the items with operational value.
Post-farmhouse saddle debrief restated the same clue chain in question-answer form, then again in route analysis; collapsed into one short handoff.
Departure sequence over-explained bandage, saddling, and mounted separation; trimmed mechanics while keeping the emotional split.
Replaced report-shaped phrasing around the compound approach with Sylvanas-grounded threat reads.
Cut logistics-heavy wording from the regroup recap so it stopped sounding like a field memorandum.
Changed the compound inference from expanded route-summary language to direct scene terms.
Reduced outside-the-moment abstractions in narration where Sylvanas would simply price danger and move.
Kept Jaina's technical lines only where the plot required mechanism knowledge and the speech still sounded live.
Removed explanatory scaffolding that narrated what the reader already understood from action.
Trimmed repeated consequence statements after the farmhouse escape so the chapter stayed inside pressure instead of summary.
Shortened the retreat corridor sequence to keep the focus on immediate survival rather than after-action narration.
Compressed the ridge regroup so grief registered through behavior instead of repeated explanatory framing.
Preserved Sylvanas's clipped command rhythm by cutting connective tissue rather than adding smoother editorial prose.
Changed Jaina's clue line from a more bureaucratic labor-description to 'Few hands cycling through.'
Reduced Barov-route talk to plain field language instead of packet-label shorthand.
Changed the Dalaran/Convocation discussion to spoken scene language rather than institutional phrasing where possible.
Kept Jaina's 'body is part of the lock' because the mechanism matters and the line still sounds like her downshifted mage register.
Kept Sylvanas, Lor'themar, and Cyndia in short spoken judgments; no spoken line now reads like a memo or report.
Re-read the densest prose blocks: kitchen read, compound trap, and ridge split.
Reduced the Cyndia right-flank grief motif from repeated echo to recurring signal so it still lands at the end.
Preserved the strong image 'The orchard had grown men' because it reads as fresh pressure, not AI ornament.
Preserved the farewell refrain 'May the stars keep your road' because it is a continuity trigger, not repetition slop.
Final pass confirmed page shape variation: short impact paragraphs in action, one denser regroup paragraph, and a cleaner closing split.

changes.before: North of Andorhal the roads stayed clear, the ditches cut back, the dead orchards trimmed for sightlines... Horse sweat steamed under the cold...
changes.after: North of Andorhal the roads stayed clear, the ditches cut back, the dead orchards trimmed for sightlines...

changes.before: Cyndia checked left. Lyriel turned to take the rear. Sylvanas studied the house. One more ruin, until the nearness showed the tidy emptiness...
changes.after: Cyndia checked left. Lyriel turned to take the rear. Sylvanas studied the house: one more ruin until the nearness showed the tidy emptiness...

changes.before: Shelves stripped. Crockery broken on purpose. A side table blackened by heat. Three cloudy bottles: one intact, one shattered under a chair, one wax-stoppered with a smeared seal.
changes.after: Shelves stripped. Crockery broken on purpose. A side table blackened by heat. Three cloudy bottles, one intact, one shattered, one wax-stoppered.

changes.before: Jaina's face tightened. The panic hid. The speed did not. "I can give you what keeps it alive through storage and baking. The final step is missing."
changes.after: Jaina's face tightened. "I can give you what keeps it alive through storage and baking. The final step is missing."

changes.before: "Yes. Not enough. Yes." / "Define it." / "The part that keeps the treatment alive through storage and baking..." / "But enough to point higher."
changes.after: "Yes. The part that keeps it alive through storage and baking. Proof the body matters before death. The final step is still missing." / "No. But enough to point higher."

changes.before: "There was a mark under the reagent shelf. Estate road, not Andorhal town use. Northeast approach. Private stores. Few hands cycling through. Big enough to matter."
changes.after: "There was a mark under the reagent shelf. Estate road, not Andorhal town use. Northeast approach. Private stores. Few hands cycling through."

changes.before: Jaina spent the next miles with the farmhouse scraps spread over her saddle horn, checking them against the road as it bent and broke. By the time the rise came into view, the shape was clear: northeast approach, private stores, a compound above the road.
changes.after: By the time the rise came into view, the shape was clear: a compound above the road.

changes.before: She had already found the seam in the patrol pattern... Every delay now came priced in food, watch rotations, spellwork, blood.
changes.after: She had already found the seam... Every delay now came priced in blood.

changes.before: Cyndia answered every order, but once the right flank pulled her eyes and had to be dragged back... At the first narrow lane through the scrub, Sylvanas stopped and glanced at Jaina...
changes.after: Cyndia answered every order, but once the right flank pulled her eyes and had to be dragged back. At the first narrow lane through the scrub, Jaina swept once and nodded.

changes.before: "Barov roads. Barov access. Barov storehouses, probably. Nothing stronger than that yet."
changes.after: "Barov roads. Barov access. Storehouses, probably. Nothing stronger than that yet."

changes.before: He handed the second to Jaina and the first to no one. Sylvanas took it anyway.
changes.after: He handed the second to Jaina. Sylvanas took the first without waiting.

changes.before: The light bled out of the fields by degrees. Frost thickened on the ridge grass... They saddled in the dark... Professional. Clean. Wrong. Necessary.
changes.after: The light bled out of the fields... They saddled in the dark... Then Jaina stepped back, mounted, and turned her horse toward the Eastweald road without looking for permission.

flags: Kept 'The orchard had grown men' — fresh pressure image, not metaphor fog.
Kept 'The body is part of the lock' — plot-critical mechanism line in valid Jaina field register.
Kept repeated farewell 'May the stars keep your road' — continuity breadcrumb, not accidental reuse.
